op.name: setbufsize
op.notes: Set size of buffer used in ufuncs. Not supported.
op.summary: Set the size of the buffer used in ufuncs.

blocks.text: Set the size of the buffer used in ufuncs.

blocks.name: versionchanged:: 2.0
blocks.body:
The scope of setting the buffer is tied to the `numpy.errstate`
    context.  Exiting a ``with errstate():`` will also restore the bufsize.
blocks.raw:
.. versionchanged:: 2.0
    The scope of setting the buffer is tied to the `numpy.errstate`
    context.  Exiting a ``with errstate():`` will also restore the bufsize.

desc_blocks.text: Previous size of ufunc buffer in bytes.

blocks.text: When exiting a `numpy.errstate` context manager the bufsize is restored:

blocks.code:
>>> import numpy as np
>>> with np.errstate():
...     np.setbufsize(4096)
...     print(np.getbufsize())
...
8192
4096
>>> np.getbufsize()
8192
